resources.name: assistant_tools
resources.title: Assistant Tool Catalog

resources.name: assistant_answer_templates
resources.title: Assistant Answer Templates
resources.description: Governed response structures for validation, retrieval, standards, workflow, review, and export tasks.

resources.name: assistant_examples
resources.title: Assistant Starter Examples
resources.description: End-user task starters loaded from trusted knowledge data.

resources.name: retrieval_strategies
resources.title: Retrieval Strategy Catalog
resources.description: Hybrid retrieval, RRF, metadata-filtered, exact-source, and review-oriented strategy profiles.

resources.name: source_trust_policies
resources.title: Source Trust Policies
resources.description: Healthcare source authority, scope, license, refresh, and intended-use policies.

resources.name: retrieval_search_presets
resources.title: Retrieval Search Presets
resources.description: Data-driven query presets for validation, FHIR mapping, terminology, PHI, and medical search workflows.

resources.name: retrieval_search_options
resources.title: Retrieval Search Options
resources.description: Allowed retrieval UI/API options such as formats, top-k values, source types, and standards filters.

resources.name: workflow_queue
resources.title: Recent Workflow Queue
resources.description: Recent workflow states visible to the local MCP server runtime.

resources.name: review_queue

resources.description: Recent workflows with pending human review gates.

resources.name: schema_catalog
resources.title: Schema Catalog
resources.description: Configured validation schemas available to workflows and Assistant tools.

resources.name: knowledge_source_inventory
resources.title: Knowledge Source Inventory
resources.description: Indexed retrieval source inventory including source type, trust level, domain, standard, and chunk count.
